hypothesis: Gradient descent on differentiable XRD-similarity loss functions (negative cosine similarity, MSE, negative entropy) cannot reliably recover ground-truth crystal structures from realistic lattice strain (σl) and coordinate noise (σc) perturbations—even when enforcing symmetry via projected gradients—because the XRD loss landscape is highly non-convex and rugged, yielding low Match Rates compared to energy-based CHGNet relaxation.
